MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, KMF SF III, LLC is present.
Attorney John P. Baba appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Kimberly Crawford, is present.
Attorney Yalie Sun representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled, the signed settlement agreement is not filed. The trial date of OCT-31-2011 is vacated.
